name: Symple
author: Christian Freeling & Benedikt Rosenau (2010) / AGP port
description: Christian Freeling & Benedikt Rosenau's group/area game on a Go board. Each turn you either PLACE one stone starting a new group (not adjacent to your own stones) or GROW every one of your groups by one stone at once. Score = your stones minus P times your number of groups (P even, default 8); most points wins. A balancing rule lets the second player grow-and-place in one turn before any growth has happened. Drawless by design.
